from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *

source_container = "retail-data"
target_container = "bronze"
entities = ["customers","sales","sales_orders"]

def add_metadata_columns(df):
    df = df\
        .withColumn("file_path", input_file_name())\
        .withColumn("last_updated_ts", current_timestamp())
    return df

for entity in entities:
    print (f"Data processing started for entity: {entity}")

    df = spark.read.format("csv")\
        .option("header","true")\
        .option("inferSchema","true")\
        .load(f"abfss://{source_container}@ecomdevstorage1.dfs.core.windows.net/{entity}/*")
    
    print(f"Read completed for {entity} in {source_container} container. Now adding tow metadata columns to {entity}.")

    df = add_metadata_columns(df)
    
    print(f"Metadata columns added successfully. Now writing {entity} to {target_container} container.")

    df.write\
        .format("delta")\
        .mode("overwrite")\
        .save(f"abfss://{target_container}@ecomdevstorage1.dfs.core.windows.net/{entity}/")
    
    print(f"Write completed for {entity} in {target_container} container.")

print(f"Data processing completed successfully for all entities: {entities}")
